title: The AI Podcast Pipeline
summary: A practical look at research, verification, and audio generation.
description: A sample Pleopod episode video payload.
transcript:
TTS the following conversation between Arman and Maya:

Arman: Welcome back. Today we are looking at how an AI podcast pipeline should work.
Maya: The key is simple: research first, verify every important claim, then generate audio.
Arman: That pipeline gives operators something they can inspect, retry, and trust.
Maya: And once the episode exists, a video renderer can turn it into a polished visual asset for podcast apps and social platforms.

brand.name: Pleopod
brand.tagline: Factual tech podcasts, generated with evidence.
